full_prompt: Design a cast steel main-bearing support bracket for a direct-drive wind turbine nacelle, in the spirit of a canonical wind-turbine main-bearing-bracket patent (EP3339652A1-style), for a canonical 6 MW-class onshore turbine. Envelope: 1,200 x 800 x 600 mm (large cast part). Interfaces: bearing-side circular seat of 900 mm diameter with 24 M48 class 10.9 bolts on a 850 mm bolt circle (standard main-bearing interface); machine-frame-side mounting pattern of 16 M42 class 10.9 bolts on a 1,000 x 500 mm rectangular pattern. Material: cast steel GS-42CrMo4 (EN 10293) with yield 550 MPa, UTS 700 MPa, Young's modulus 210 GPa, density 7850 kg/m^3, Charpy impact at -20 C >= 27 J. Load cases derived from wind turbine main-bearing loading per IEC 61400-1 Ed.4 + DNVGL-ST-0361: LC1 DLC 1.2 normal operation fatigue-equivalent radial load 800 kN + axial 250 kN + tilting moment 1,500 kN*m (representative 6 MW-class hub loads); LC2 DLC 6.1 50-year extreme wind idling: radial 1,800 kN + axial 500 kN + tilting 3,500 kN*m; LC3 DLC 6.2 extreme with grid loss: radial 2,100 kN + axial 600 kN + tilting 4,000 kN*m; LC4 bolt preload only (24 x M48 10.9 at 4,400 N*m tightening = 590 kN preload per bolt per VDI 2230). Pass/fail per IEC 61400-1 + DNVGL-ST-0361: (R1) max von Mises at DLC 1.2 fatigue load <= yield / 1.5 = 367 MPa (partial safety factor gamma_M = 1.5 normal operation + gamma_F = 1.0); (R2) max von Mises at DLC 6.1/6.2 extreme <= yield / 1.1 = 500 MPa (partial safety factors for extreme conditions); (R3) max von Mises at ultimate (= 1.35 x DLC 6.2) <= UTS / 1.25 = 560 MPa; (R4) bearing-seat out-of-roundness under LC2 <= 0.1 mm (bearing clearance / life requirement); (R5) bolt F_B_max <= 0.9 x yield = F_p x 0.9 per VDI 2230 at LC4; (R6) fatigue life >= 20 years at DLC 1.2 equivalent spectrum (DEL analysis) using GS-42CrMo4 S-N curve per EN 13906 or EN 1993-1-9 Category 140; (R7) mass <= 5,500 kg (typical for this class of main-bearing bracket) with >=10% mass reduction vs a thick-plate welded baseline of equivalent stiffness. Deliverables: STEP AP242 casting drawing pack (casting tolerance ISO 8062 CT10); FEA + fatigue report.
short_prompt:
Design a cast steel main-bearing support bracket for a direct-drive wind turbine nacelle in the spirit of a canonical main-bearing-bracket patent (EP3339652A1-style), for a 6 MW-class onshore turbine.

Envelope: 1,200 x 800 x 600 mm (large cast part). Bearing-side: circular seat of 900 mm diameter with 24 M48 class 10.9 bolts on an 850 mm bolt circle. Machine-frame-side: 16 M42 class 10.9 bolts on a 1,000 x 500 mm rectangular pattern.

Material: cast steel GS-42CrMo4 (EN 10293), Charpy impact at -20 C >= 27 J. Casting tolerance ISO 8062 CT10.

Design per IEC 61400-1 Ed.4 + DNVGL-ST-0361 with partial safety factor gamma_M = 1.5 normal and gamma_F = 1.0; extreme gamma_M = 1.1; ultimate factor 1.35 x DLC 6.2 against UTS / 1.25.

Load cases.
- LC1 DLC 1.2 normal fatigue-equivalent: radial 800 kN + axial 250 kN + tilting 1,500 kN*m.
- LC2 DLC 6.1 50-year extreme idling: radial 1,800 kN + axial 500 kN + tilting 3,500 kN*m.
- LC3 DLC 6.2 extreme + grid loss: radial 2,100 kN + axial 600 kN + tilting 4,000 kN*m.
- LC4 bolt preload only: 24 x M48 10.9 at 4,400 N*m = 590 kN preload per bolt (VDI 2230).

Additional gates: bearing-seat out-of-roundness under LC2 <= 0.1 mm; fatigue life >= 20 years per EN 1993-1-9 Category 140; mass <= 5,500 kg with >= 10% mass reduction vs thick-plate welded baseline.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: Design load cases from aeroelastic simulation (OpenFAST / Bladed) are upstream inputs, not part of this FEA step.
DEL computation is a closed-form Palmgren-Miner step.

prompt.title: Cast GS-42CrMo4 main-bearing bracket for 6 MW-class wind turbine (wind-turbine main-bearing-bracket patent EP3339652A1 style)
prompt.brief: Design a 1200x800x600 mm cast steel main-bearing support bracket; pass IEC 61400-1 DLC fatigue + extreme cases, VDI 2230 bolt preload, and 20-year fatigue life.

pass_fail_criteria.note: LC3 magnitude multiplied by 1.35 for ultimate check

analysis_types: linear static x3 DLC + bolt preload + fatigue DEL

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Dynamic behavior is handled at the global turbine aeroelastic model level, not the bracket.
exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Aero loads already reduced to hub loads.

notes.patent_fetch: Specific EP3339652A1 claim loads are placeholders; hub load magnitudes chosen for 6 MW class. needs_patent_fetch = true at root.
notes.numeric_source: IEC 61400-1 Ed.4 partial SF framework + representative 6 MW hub load envelope.

eval_coverage: large cast component geometry + bolt preload
